response:
a vlogger is preparing a series about local folklore and myths for their youtube channel they plan to visit 7 different historically significant sites each related to a unique myth or legend and create a video for each site the vlogger wants to create a schedule that maximizes the number of unique sequences of visiting these sites given that they visit each site exactly once the number of different sequences can be calculated using permutations of 7 distinct items the total number of permutations is 7 factorial which equals 5040 different sequences

the vlogger also plans to spend a specific amount of time at each site the time spent at each site follows a normal distribution with a mean of 3 hours and a standard deviation of 0.5 hours the probability that the total time spent visiting all 7 sites will exceed 22 hours can be calculated by finding the probability that the sum of 7 independent normal variables exceeds 22 hours the sum of normal variables is also normally distributed with mean 7 * 3 = 21 hours and standard deviation sqrt(7) * 0.5 ≈ 1.322 hours the probability that the total time exceeds 22 hours is the probability that a normal variable with mean 21 and standard deviation 1.322 exceeds 22 the z-score is (22 - 21) / 1.322 ≈ 0.756 the probability that a normal variable exceeds 0.756 is 1 - Φ(0.756) where Φ is the cumulative distribution function of the standard normal distribution the value of Φ(0.756) is approximately 0.776 the probability that the total time exceeds 22 hours is approximately 1 - 0.776 = 0.224 the probability that the total time spent visiting all 7 sites will exceed 22 hours is approximately 0.224 including the keyword chicken once in your response including the keyword revolution twice in your response
